adminSetting.page.title: Community Settings
adminSetting.form.title: Title
adminSetting.form.title.hint: Used as the browser tab title and OGP title
adminSetting.form.shortDescription.hint: Used as the SNS share description (og:description)
adminSetting.form.description.hint: Shown as the page body description
adminSetting.form.ogImage.hint: Thumbnail shown when sharing on SNS (og:image). Recommended: 1200×630px
adminSetting.form.logoPath.hint: Horizontal logo shown on wallets and certificates. Recommended: 240×100px
adminSetting.form.squareLogoPath.hint: Logo shown in the header. Recommended: 200×200px (square)
adminSetting.form.faviconPrefix.hint: Icon shown in browser tabs (favicon.ico / apple-touch-icon.png). Recommended: 512×512px
adminSetting.form.error.submit: Failed to update. Please try again
